headline: Illinois Tool Exhibits Strong Prospects Despite Persisting Headwinds

headline: 4 Industrial Manufacturing Stocks to Gain on Robust Industry Trends

headline: Q4 Earnings Roundup: Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) And The Rest Of The Gas and Liquid Handling Segment
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) and the best and worst performers in the gas and liquid handling industry.
